_note: Add sources here as {"name": "Company", "url": "..."}. The scraper auto-detects the ATS (Greenhouse, Ashby, Lever, SmartRecruiters, Workday) from the URL hostname. For company-branded domains (e.g. careers.example.com) it falls back to generic HTML scraping of __NEXT_DATA__ + JSON-LD JobPosting. Re-run scripts/scrape.mjs after editing.
